dashboard.title: Device Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Manage multiple WhatsApp sessions.
dashboard.sessionNameHint: Only alphanumeric characters, dashes, and underscores.
dashboard.baileysDesc: WebSocket based. Ultra fast and low CPU/RAM usage.
dashboard.puppeteerDesc: Browser based. High compatibility for edge features.
dashboard.tapMenu: Tap Menu or Settings and select Linked Devices
dashboard.pointPhone: Point your phone to this screen to capture the code

alerts.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to permanently delete session '{{id}}'? This cannot be undone.
alerts.disconnectConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disconnect '{{id}}'? You will need to scan the QR code to reconnect.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, API keys, and configurations.
settings.apiKeysDesc: Use these keys to authenticate your API requests.
settings.engineSwitchWarningText: You are about to switch session
settings.engineSwitchWarningAlert: Warning: Changing the engine requires the session to be DISCONNECTED. After switching, you will need to reconnect the device and scan a new QR code.

docs.title: API Documentation
docs.subtitle: Learn how to integrate WhatsApp messaging into your application.
docs.authDesc: All requests to the messaging endpoints require authentication using the x-api-key header.
docs.howToGetApiKey: How to get your API Key
docs.howToGetApiKeyDesc: Once you pair a device in the dashboard, navigate into the "Settings" menu to view and copy your active Session API Key. Each device you pair runs independently under its given key.
docs.sendMessageDesc: Send a plain text message to a mobile number.
docs.phoneParam: The recipient's phone number including country code (e.g., 593991234567).
docs.messageParam: The text content of your message.

docs2.title: API Documentation
docs2.introDesc: Welcome to the WhatsApp SaaS API. A powerful, multi-session WhatsApp automation tool built for scale. This documentation will guide you through all system endpoints, their exact required payloads, and how to use them with your unique API keys.
docs2.archDesc: Our architecture provides stable WhatsApp connectivity using the Baileys library and supports multiple concurrent user sessions isolated natively via unique API keys.
docs2.authDesc: All requests to the messaging endpoints require authentication using the x-api-key header.
docs2.howToGet: How to get your API Key:
